name: Ice Cream Crown Oatmeal
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. For Flaky Oatmeal: Stir the oats into briskly boiling salted water in a pot. Cook for 1 minute with quick oats, stirring occasionally. Cook for 5 minutes or longer with old fashioned oats. Cover the pan and remove from heat, letting it stand for a few minutes.
2. For Creamy Oatmeal: Combine oats, salt, and cold water in a separate pot. Bring to a boil, then cook as above.
Top each serving with your favorite scoop of ice cream.
Toppings for oatmeal may include brown sugar, preserves, fresh, canned or thawed frozen peach slices, applesauce, semi-sweet chocolate pieces, marshmallows, dates, raisins, honey, maple-blended syrup, or sliced bananas.
For Fruit-Blended Oatmeal: Add 1/2 cup chopped pitted dates, prunes, raisins, dried apricots, or chopped apple to the water just before stirring in the oats. Cook as for Flaky or Creamy Oatmeal.
